channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Mark Zuckerberg says Apple hasn’t innovated since the iPhone. He’s forgetting about this one major thing
item.description: Last week, as part of his apparent ongoing campaign to rebrand himself as a more Musk-like figure, Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg sat down with Joe Rogan for a three-hour discussion about free speech, government “censorship,” and how important it is that American companies win the AI race.
item.dc:creator: Michael Grothaus, Fast Company

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: China gains ground
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents now and for the future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: That Apple ID disabled message? It's a dangerous scam
item.description: Kurt the CyberGuy breaks down why those emails that warn that "Your Apple ID has been disabled" is most likely a scam. Here's how to protect yourself.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: SpaceX launch accident likely caused by fire that sent trails of flaming debris near the Caribbean
item.description: SpaceX suspects a fire may have caused its Starship to break apart during liftoff and send trails of flaming debris near the Caribbean.
item.dc:creator: Marcia Dunn, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Best ways to give your old iPhone a second life
item.description: Tech guru Kurt "CyberGuy" Knutsson explores the many different ways you can repurpose that old iPhone of yours rather than trashing it.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Execs are prioritizing skills over degrees
item.description: When considering new hires, 80% of corporate executives will prioritize skills over degrees, with half planning to increase freelance hiring this year to fill in for a gap in AI and other skills, according to a new study from freelancing platform Upwork.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: HPE adelanta a Dell y Supermicro al sellar un acuerdo con X: servidores de IA por 1.000 millones de dólares
item.description: Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) ha firmado un contrato superior a 1.000 millones de dólares para suministrar servidores de inteligencia artificial a X, la plataforma antes conocida como Twitter, según Bloomberg.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Biden's big semiconductor law will ramp up US chip production -- but at a high cost, report finds
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A sweeping 2022 law, touted by President Joe Biden as a way to revive U.S. manufacturing of semiconductors and reduce the country’s reliance on foreign-made computer chips, will “sharply increase production’’ of semiconductors in the United States.
item.dc:creator: PAUL WISEMAN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Inside the DHS Science and Technology Directorate’s search for better wireless communications
item.description: The Homeland Security Department's Science and Technology Directorate has an ongoing research program for the development of cellular. The post Inside the DHS Science and Technology Directorate’s search for better wireless communications first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network

item.title: First 15 things to do or try first when you get a new iPhone
item.description: Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson: If you just bought a new iPhone, here’s what to do first when you fire it up.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 2025 global network outage report and internet health check
item.description: The reliability of services delivered by ISPs, cloud providers and conferencing services is critical for enterprise organizations.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Next-gen Ethernet standards set to move forward in 2025
item.description: 2024 was a banner year for Ethernet, which has been a foundational element of networking for more than 50 years and is poised for more advancements as 2025 kicks off. Multiple standards and certification efforts made progress in 2024, helping networks to be more reliable and deliver more bandwidth.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: New Brazil law restricts use of smartphones in elementary and high schools
item.description: SAO PAULO (AP) — Brazil's President Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva on Monday signed a bill restricting the use of smartphones at school, following a global trend for such limitations. The move will impact students at elementary and high schools across the South American nation starting in February.
item.dc:creator: MAURICIO SAVARESE and DIARLEI RODRIGUES, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: 5-minute cleanup for your phone and computer
item.description: Technology expert Kim Komando shares her easy tips on how to declutter your phones, computers and devices from the files you no longer need.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Red Hat completes Neural Magic acquisition
item.description: Jan. 13, 2025 update: Red Hat announced it has completed its acquisition of Neural Magic, a pioneer in software and algorithms that accelerate gen AI inference workloads. Red Hat first announced its intent to acquire the company on Nov. 12, 2024. Today’s announcement confirms the close of the deal.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Unauthorized Drone Flights Double in SoCal Amid Wildfires
item.description: LA County Sheriff Robert Luna announced three arrests related to unauthorized drone flights, which have doubled in southern California during multiple wildfires.
item.dc:creator: Steph Whiteside, NewsNation

item.title: Britain's leader unveils AI strategy, including vow to rip up red tape hindering AI projects
item.description: LONDON (AP) — The British government pledged on Monday to rip up the red tape hindering construction of data centers that underpin artificial intelligence while promoting its “pro-innovation” approach to regulating the technology.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: The future of trucking rolls forward in Shell's experimental big rig
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson takes a closer look at Shell's Starship 3.0: A natural gas big rig boosting efficiency 2.5 times, proving greener trucking.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
